name: Canteloupe Salsa
recipeIngredient: 1 canteloupe (cubed flesh, discarding rind and seeds)
Salt and fresh ground pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Dice the cubed flesh of the canteloupe, discarding the rind and seeds.
2. Dice the yellow bell pepper.
3. Mix the diced canteloupe and bell pepper together.
4. In a separate bowl, mix the juice from one lime with the rice vinegar.
5. Crush the dried tepin chiles using a coffee grinder or similar device reserved for spices.
6. Add the crushed tepin chiles to the lime-rice vinegar mixture.
7. If tepin chiles are unavailable, use one hot Thai chili or a fresh jalapeño as an alternative; these will add green color to the yellow-orange salsa.
8. Season with salt and freshly ground pepper to taste.
9. Allow the salsa to sit in the refrigerator for several hours before serving to allow flavors to meld.
10. Stir in chopped cilantro or mint just before serving.
